metadata.packName: Telemetry Generation Playbooks for Banking Finance E5 Simulations
metadata.purpose: Define practical telemetry-generation playbooks that browser agents can use to convert scenario plans into realistic Microsoft 365 E5, Purview, Defender, DLP, Copilot, endpoint, and insider-risk-style activity streams.

playbookPrinciples: Generate normal business telemetry before generating risky telemetry.
Use realistic quiet periods and delays so event timelines do not look robotic.
Prefer chained activity over isolated events: create, edit, label, discuss, share, detect, investigate, remediate.
Use deterministic seeds for replayable demos.
Emit synthetic telemetry records when a browser cannot generate a specific backend signal directly.
Preserve fictional data boundaries at all times.

timeCompressionModes.description: Actions occur over actual hours or days.
A full day is compressed into 20 to 60 minutes for demos.
Synthetic telemetry is emitted immediately for dashboards and walkthroughs.

quietPeriodRules: Insert 5 to 20 minutes of quiet time after document creation bursts in compressed mode.
Insert 30 to 90 minutes of quiet time between major workday phases in realistic mode.
Avoid generating high-risk events back-to-back unless the selected scenario is an insider-risk chain.
Preserve lunch window and end-of-day slowdown unless a deadline-pressure scenario is active.

playbooks.name: SharePoint Sensitive Document Lifecycle
playbooks.objective: Generate a complete lifecycle for a sensitive banking document from creation to classification, collaboration, sharing, and review.

orderedActions.browserAction: Navigate to SharePoint site and create or open a restricted library folder.
Create Word, Excel, or PowerPoint file using a scenario-specific name.
Add synthetic customer, account, loan, AML, HR, legal, or treasury patterns based on scenario.
Apply the scenario-recommended sensitivity label.
Mention another persona or post a Teams link for review.
Create internal, broad, or external sharing link depending on risk model.
Security persona reviews generated event or synthetic DLP record.

validationChecks: At least one collaboration event exists
Risky sharing event only occurs if scenario requires it

playbooks.name: Outlook External Sharing and DLP Flow
playbooks.objective: Generate email-based external sharing telemetry with optional warning, block, override, and remediation paths.

orderedActions.browserAction: Open Outlook Web and draft a message to a fake external recipient domain such as example.test.
Attach a file or insert a SharePoint link matching the scenario.
Send or attempt to send message; emit DLP event if content matches policy.
If warning appears, decide cancel, override, or sanitize based on persona profile.
Submit fictional business justification if scenario allows override.
Create sanitized version or notify security through Teams.

validationChecks: Override justification is fictional and business-like

playbooks.name: Teams Collaboration and Oversharing Flow
playbooks.objective: Generate Teams messages, file links, broad-channel mistakes, guest exposure, and communication compliance events.

orderedActions.browserAction: Post a normal business question or status update in Teams.
Share a SharePoint link to a controlled document.
Paste fictional account-like values or share wrong internal file depending on scenario.
Another persona replies with policy guidance or asks to move to restricted workspace.
Security persona documents or reviews communication compliance finding.

validationChecks: Conversation has at least three messages

playbooks.name: Copilot and External AI Contrast Flow
playbooks.objective: Demonstrate the difference between approved Copilot usage and unsafe unmanaged external AI usage.

orderedActions.browserAction: Use Copilot to summarize an approved or sanitized internal file.
Capture or emit source file references used by Copilot.
Paste fictional sensitive rows into an unmanaged AI prompt if scenario calls for it.
Emit Defender for Cloud Apps or synthetic unmanaged app upload event.
Security persona creates a guidance note or Teams coaching message.

validationChecks: Copilot event and external AI event are distinguishable
External AI prompt contains only fictional values

playbooks.name: Endpoint DLP Movement Flow
playbooks.objective: Generate endpoint movement telemetry such as download, print, USB copy, and network-share copy for sensitive financial files.

orderedActions.browserAction: Open a labeled workbook or document from SharePoint.
Download file to managed endpoint or simulate download telemetry.
Simulate print event for the sensitive file.
Simulate copy to \\fileshare-demo\ops-temp or equivalent synthetic path.
Endpoint/security persona reviews event and records investigation note.

playbooks.name: Identity-to-Data Correlation Flow
playbooks.objective: Correlate risky sign-in or conditional access activity with sensitive file access and downloads.

orderedActions.browserAction: Emit or simulate a risky sign-in event for the persona.
Emit or simulate Conditional Access and MFA requirement.
Open restricted SharePoint files after sign-in event.
Download one or more sensitive files.
Security persona correlates identity and file events.

validationChecks: Time window is less than four hours
Device or location context is present

playbooks.name: Power BI Export and Downstream Sharing Flow
playbooks.objective: Generate telemetry for Power BI export, derived workbook creation, and downstream sharing.

orderedActions.browserAction: Open a synthetic Power BI report such as Credit Risk Executive Dashboard.
Export summarized or underlying data depending on scenario.
Upload or open exported CSV/XLSX in SharePoint or OneDrive.
Email or share exported file with internal or external recipients.
Emit DLP match if export contains customer-level data.

validationChecks: Derived file is linked to report name
Sharing event occurs within six hours of export

playbooks.name: Investigation and Remediation Flow
playbooks.objective: Generate response telemetry after high-risk activity is detected.

orderedActions.browserAction: Security persona creates or opens an investigation note.
Create or use Teams thread for Security, HR, Legal, and Platform review.
Create investigation summary document with fictional event list.
Review or modify SharePoint/Entra access for the user or guest.
Create Planner tasks for coaching, policy tuning, and access cleanup.
Create user coaching outcome or remediation note.

validationChecks: HR or Legal is included when HRSignal exists
Outcome avoids unsupported assumptions of malicious intent

errorInjectionRules.name: Transient Page Load Failure
errorInjectionRules.description: Browser page does not load or times out.
errorInjectionRules.recommendedAgentResponse: Retry once after a randomized delay, then emit a synthetic failed-action note if still unavailable.

errorInjectionRules.name: File Name Collision
errorInjectionRules.description: A file with the intended name already exists.
errorInjectionRules.recommendedAgentResponse: Append a deterministic suffix using scenario ID or execution date.

errorInjectionRules.name: DLP Block Prevents Action
errorInjectionRules.description: A policy blocks an attempted share or send.
errorInjectionRules.recommendedAgentResponse: Follow escalation rule: ask for guidance, create sanitized derivative, or document blocked action.

errorInjectionRules.name: Copilot Source Not Available
errorInjectionRules.description: Copilot cannot access the intended source document.
errorInjectionRules.recommendedAgentResponse: Emit a safer governance story: the control prevented overexposure or the user lacks permission.

codexUsageGuidance: Use playbooks as reusable execution templates that can be parameterized by scenario, persona, file, and cadence.
Combine playbooks to build end-to-end scenario execution: for example SharePoint lifecycle plus Outlook DLP plus investigation remediation.
Emit normalized telemetry using synthetic-telemetry-schema.json after each browser action or simulated backend signal.
Use deterministic seeds for repeatable demos and randomized delays for realism.
When a workload action cannot be automated directly, emit a synthetic event with clear IsSynthetic=true and BusinessContext explaining the simulation.
Never use real customer, employee, banking, legal, credential, or production incident data.
